key.name: holiday-dates
key.description: List of dates to highlight as holidays in the calendar popup. Each entry must be an ISO 8601 date string in YYYY-MM-DD format.

key.name: enable-weekend-highlight
key.description: When enabled, Saturday and Sunday cells are colored in the calendar popup.

key.name: enable-holiday-highlight
key.description: When enabled, dates listed in holiday-dates are highlighted.

key.name: enable-event-highlight
key.description: When enabled, calendar days that have scheduled events are highlighted.

key.name: separate-notifications-menu
key.summary: Split notifications into a separate header menu
key.description: When enabled, the message list is removed from the date menu and shown in its own panel button next to the clock.

key.name: weekend-color
key.description: Color applied to Saturday and Sunday cells.

key.name: holiday-color
key.description: Background color applied to holiday cells.

key.name: event-color
key.description: Color for the underline shown on days with scheduled events.
